description: The creator explicitly calls Palkia + Zacian the 'Pulkazian core' — the common supporting cast around Mega Mewtwo Y. Palkia applies fast Spatial Rend/Aqua Tail pressure and energy generation while Zacian Crowned Sword closes with Behemoth Blade and Close Combat, the pairing defining the Mega Master League meta.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: *HUNDO* MEGA MEWTWO Y has arrived in the Mega Master League! | Pokemon GO Battle League
